raw_block:
–1. Also called JEHIEL
  .A Reubenite1Ch 5:7
–2. A Benjamite1Ch 9:35
–3. One of David’s heroes1Ch 11:44
–4. A Levite and chorister in the tabernacle services1Ch 15:18,21;16:5
–5. A Levite, ancestor of Jehaziel, who encouraged Judah against 
their enemies2Ch 20:14
–6. A scribe during the reign of Uzziah2Ch 26:11
–7. A Levite who cleansed the temple2Ch 29:13
–8. A chief of the Levites who gave, with other chiefs, five-thousand 
five-hundred “small cattle” for sacrifice2Ch 35:9
–9. A son of Adonikam, an exile who returned to Jerusalem with 
EzraEzr 8:13
–10. A priest who was defiled by marriage to an idolatrous womanEzr 10:43
